sourceList.title: Our Royal, Titled, Noble, and Commoner Ancestors & Cousins

A genealogical history of the Rehoboth branch of the Carpenter family in America, brought down from their English ancestor, John Carpenter, 1303, with many biographical notes of descendants and allied families  by     Carpenter, Amos B. (Amos Bugbee), b.

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Carpenter of Homme於1440年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親John Carpenter 'The Younger'30歲，母親Katherine Jennings26歲。他於1458年與Lady Agnes Homme在英國賀福爾迪爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1520年在英國英格蘭賀福爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國素可維斯波洛 格林。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Carpenter of Homme was born in 1440, in Herefordshire, England, his father, John Carpenter 'The Younger', was 30 and his mother, Katherine Jennings, was 26. He married Lady Agnes Homme in 1458, in Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1520, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Wisborough Green, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Carpenter of Homme est né en 1440, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Carpenter 'The Younger', avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine Jennings, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Homme en 1458, à Dilwyn, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1520, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Wisborough Green, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Carpenter of Homme 1440 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Carpenter 'The Younger' 30 und seine Mutter Katherine Jennings 26. Er hat 1458 in Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England Lady Agnes Homme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1520 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wisborough Green, Sussex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Agnes Homme nel 1458, nel Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1520, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Wisborough Green, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Carpenter of Hommeが1440年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Carpenter 'The Younger'は30歳，母Katherine Jenningsは26歳であった。1458年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアデルウインでLady Agnes Hommeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1520年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで80歳で死去し，イギリススセックスウィスボロウ グレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Carpenter of Homme(이)가 1440년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Carpenter 'The Younger'(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Jennings(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1458년 영국 허퍼드실르 디w이에서 Lady Agnes Homme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 와이스버루그h 그린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Carpenter of Homme nasceu em 1440, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Carpenter 'The Younger', tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Jennings, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Homme em 1458, em Dilwyn, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1520, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Wisborough Green, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Carpenter of Homme родился в 1440 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Carpenter 'The Younger' было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Jennings, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Homme в 1458 г. в местности дилвин, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1520 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности висбороую грин, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Agnes Homme en 1458, en Dilwyn, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1520, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Wisborough Green, Sussex, Inglaterra.
